row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a straight road with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: White sedan moving from left to right across the field of view; pedestrians walking on sidewalks.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, sidewalks, trees, and buildings. A white sedan is visible in the middle lane. Pedestrians are present on the sidewalk near a building entrance.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp details. No occlusions obscure critical elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion of ego vehicle. The white sedan moves consistently across frames without abrupt jumps. Pedestrians walk at steady pace.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain continuously visible throughout the sequence. No sudden appearances or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure, buildings, and roadside elements maintain consistent geometry and perspective over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the road.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. The white sedan is moving away laterally, posing no direct conflict. Pedestrians are on sidewalks, not entering the roadway.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and detail. White sedan appears distorted and less defined. Pedestrians are faint or partially missing.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant blurring and loss of fine detail. Some objects appear merged or ghosted. Road boundaries are less distinct.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears smoother than real video but unnaturally so. Object trajectories lack micro-variations seen in real footage. Some frames show slight warping or flickering around edges.
logical.object_continuity: Objects persist but degrade in definition over time. Pedestrians may vanish or reappear inconsistently due to generation artifacts.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall scene structure is preserved but exhibits subtle warping and instability, especially near object boundaries and distant structures.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, though motion feels slightly artificial due to smoothing effects.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability may impair downstream decision-making. Distorted vehicles and faded traffic elements could lead to misinterpretation of spatial relationships.

artifacts_or_instabilities: blurring and loss of edge definition
slight geometric warping in background structures
